decisions.briefing: Markets drifted slightly positive today with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ up 0.2% — a quiet, directionless session. With 4 open slots and $843 in available cash, I'm deploying into the two cleanest score-100 setups (FLY and TMDX) where volume surges confirm conviction. Existing positions in EAT, OLED, AMZN, NSIT, and SYNA remain intact as none have breached stop-loss or profit-target levels.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities traded in a narrow range today, with the S&P 500 and NASDAQ each gaining just 0.2%, reflecting a lack of major catalysts on either side. Investors appeared to be in a wait-and-see posture, balancing resilient corporate earnings against ongoing uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate policy and global trade flows. The flat session is consistent with typical mid-month consolidation behavior as institutional players await the next major macro data release.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日窄幅震盪，標普500指數與納斯達克指數各僅上漲0.2%，市場缺乏明確方向性催化劑。投資者似乎採取觀望態度，在企業盈利韌性與聯儲局利率政策不確定性之間尋求平衡。此種盤整走勢符合月中慣性，機構資金多靜待下一輪重要宏觀數據公佈。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks trending strongly upward, based on the idea that assets that have performed well recently tend to continue doing so in the short term. Indicators like RSI, MACD, and volume surges help confirm whether momentum is genuine and backed by real buying pressure. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply if sentiment shifts — which is why stop-losses are critical when using this approach.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是一種追蹤強勢上漲股票的策略，其邏輯在於近期表現出色的資產往往在短期內延續漲勢。RSI、MACD及成交量放大等技術指標有助於確認動能是否真實，是否由實質買盤支撐。此策略的風險在於市場情緒一旦逆轉，動能可能急速瓦解，因此嚴格執行止損是不可或缺的風控措施。
